# llms.txt — TTSTT machine-readable project map

> Local-first, modular voice toolkit for Linux (speech-to-text + text-to-speech).
> This file is a navigation aid for agents and new contributors: every module, its one-line
> job, its entry point (if any), and the unit that owns it. Update it in the same change that
> adds or moves a module (CONTRIBUTING.md, rule 7). Full design doc: docs/plans/.

Status legend: `present` = exists in this repo today. `planned (U<n>)` = not yet created;
will be added by that implementation unit — do not create a placeholder for it ahead of time.

## Root

- `pyproject.toml` — present. uv-managed project; console entry point `ttstt = "ttstt.cli:main"`.
- `uv.lock` — present. Locked dependency graph.
- `README.md` — present. Project pitch and status.
- `LICENSE` — present. MIT.
- `CONTRIBUTING.md` — present. Code style guide + licensing posture (R16).
- `llms.txt` — present. This file.
- `docs/plans/` — present. Implementation plan(s); source of truth for units/decisions.
- `scratch/spike.py` — present. U0 throwaway feasibility spike (record→transcribe→inject).
  Not part of the shipped package; not held to the style guide.

## `src/ttstt/` — the package

- `__init__.py` — present. Package docstring/marker.
- `__main__.py` — present. Enables `python -m ttstt`; delegates to `cli.main`.
- `cli.py` — present (stubs). argparse command tree: `toggle`, `daemon`, `onboard`, `config`
  (stubbed until their owning unit lands), plus roadmap-only stubs `ptt`, `say`.
- `config.py` — planned (U2). Layered config (`defaults → config.toml → TTSTT_* env → CLI`),
  validated with Pydantic. Implements `ttstt config get/set/path/show`.
- `audio.py` — planned (U3). `sounddevice` microphone capture into an in-memory buffer.
- `status.py` — planned (U7). Minimal desktop-notification status (listening/transcribing).
- `daemon.py` — planned (U7). Long-running loop + unix control socket (0600 perms); wires
  capture → STT → injection. Implements `ttstt daemon` and `ttstt toggle`.
- `onboarding.py` — planned (U8). Dependency/permission checks, model fetch, config write,
  prints the COSMIC keybind to set. Implements `ttstt onboard`.
- `stt/base.py` — planned (U4). `STTBackend` protocol (`transcribe`, forward-declared `stream`).
- `stt/faster_whisper.py` — planned (U4). Default v1 STT implementation (+ GPU warm-up →
  CPU fallback, model hash verification).
- `inject/base.py` — planned (U5). `Injector` protocol + runtime capability detection +
  `select_injector` chooser.
- `inject/wtype.py` — planned (U5). Virtual-keyboard injector; v1 default on COSMIC.
- `inject/clipboard.py` — planned (U5). Clipboard+paste fast path (consume-then-restore).
- `inject/ydotool.py` — planned (U5). uinput injector; compositor-agnostic fallback.
- `activation/base.py` — planned (U6). `Activation` protocol — provisional; one concrete
  implementation ships first, protocol formalized when a second implementation lands.
- `activation/toggle.py` — planned (U6). `ToggleActivation`: odd press starts, even stops.

## `tests/`

- `test_cli.py` — present. CLI command-tree wiring: help/version, stub exit codes/messages.
- `test_config.py` — planned (U2).
- `test_audio.py` — planned (U3).
- `test_stt_faster_whisper.py` — planned (U4).
- `test_inject.py` — planned (U5).
- `test_activation.py` — planned (U6).
- `test_daemon.py` — planned (U7).
- `test_onboarding.py` — planned (U8).

## `.github/workflows/`

- `ci.yml` — present. Linux-only: checkout → install uv → `uv sync` → `uv run ruff check` →
  `uv run pytest`.

## Entry points

- CLI: `ttstt` (console script) or `python -m ttstt`, both routed through `ttstt.cli:main`.
- Commands (v1 slice): `ttstt toggle`, `ttstt daemon`, `ttstt onboard`, `ttstt config`.
- Commands (roadmap, stubbed in v1): `ttstt ptt`, `ttstt say`.
